hindi: कर्पूर गौरं करुणावतारं, संसार सारं भुजगेन्द्र हारम्।
english: As white as camphor, embodiment of compassion, the essence of the world, wearing a garland of the king of serpents
roman: Karpur Gauram Karunavtaram, Sansaar Saaram Bhujagendra Haaram

hindi: सदा वसन्तं हृदयारविन्दे, भवं भवानी सहितं नमामि।
english: Ever dwelling in the lotus of the heart, I salute Shiva and Bhavani (Parvati) together
roman: Sada Vasantam Hridayaravinde, Bhavam Bhavani Sahitam Namaami

english: Victory to the great Lord Shiva
